cookie_banner.message: We use cookies for the site to work, for analytics and (with your consent) for marketing. See our Cookie Policy for details.

privacy_v2.meta_description: Privacy policy for Servisna Knjižica: controller Green Line Trading LTD, data categories, legal bases, user rights and contact.
privacy_v2.s1_intro: The data controller and owner of the Servisna Knjižica project is:
privacy_v2.s1_li_address: Registered address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
privacy_v2.s1_li_registry: Company registration details: Green Line Trading LTD, UK company number 13072235. Public record: Companies House.
privacy_v2.s1_dpo_intro: A Data Protection Officer (DPO) has been appointed. Contact details:
privacy_v2.s2_body: This policy applies to the processing of personal data of users of the Servisna Knjižica web and mobile application, as well as visitors to the website.
privacy_v2.s3_intro: Depending on how you use the service, we may process the following categories of data:
privacy_v2.s3_cat1_text: first and last name, email, phone number (if used), password (hashed)
privacy_v2.s3_cat2_text: make/model, year, registration details (if entered), service events, reminders, invoices/files you upload. Vehicle photos — the app may use the device camera or photo gallery only at your request, to add photos related to your vehicle (service records, gallery). Photos are stored on the server linked to your account and are not used for any other purpose.
privacy_v2.s3_cat3_text: IP address, user agent, device type, OS, error logs, technical access logs; approximate location only when you explicitly grant permission in the app, for supported features
privacy_v2.s3_cat4_text: cookies/identifiers for analytics and advertising (only where valid consent is required and given)
privacy_v2.s3_cat5_text: we do not store full card details; payment processing is performed by an external payment processor (e.g. PayPal) as a separate controller/processor under its own terms
privacy_v2.s4_intro: We process data only where we have an appropriate legal basis:
privacy_v2.s4_p1_title: Performance of a contract / provision of the service
privacy_v2.s4_p1_b: maintaining the service record and application functionality
privacy_v2.s4_p1_c: access to the camera and photos — only at your explicit request, to add photos in the app
privacy_v2.s4_p2_a: system security, abuse prevention, fraud protection
privacy_v2.s4_p3_text: compliance with applicable laws and lawful requests from authorities
privacy_v2.s4_p4_a: analytics and marketing cookies/trackers (e.g. Google Analytics, Meta/Facebook Pixel) where consent is required
privacy_v2.s4_p4_b: sending marketing messages, where applicable (including reactivation e-mail campaigns). Such messages may include a small invisible tracking pixel (1×1 image) to measure open rate, and UTM parameters in links to measure clicks — solely to improve content relevance. You can unsubscribe at any time via the "Unsubscribe" link in the footer of each message or from your account settings.
privacy_v2.s4_p4_c: use of location — when you explicitly grant permission in the app, for supported features
privacy_v2.s4_consent_note: Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal.
privacy_v2.s5_p1: We use necessary, functional, analytics and marketing cookies.
privacy_v2.s5_p2: Details (names, duration and purposes) are set out in the separate Cookie Policy.
privacy_v2.s5_li1: Necessary cookies: may not require consent where permitted by law.
privacy_v2.s5_li2: Analytics/marketing cookies: activated only after consent where required.
privacy_v2.s5_manage: You can change cookie settings at any time via the cookie banner at the bottom of the page (“Accept all” or “Essential only”) and through the Cookie Policy page on this site.
privacy_v2.s6_intro: We may share data with trusted partners only to the extent necessary to provide the service:
privacy_v2.s6_outro: We enter into appropriate data processing agreements with processors.
privacy_v2.s7_body: If data is transferred outside your country or outside the EEA/EU, we use appropriate safeguards (e.g. standard contractual clauses, adequacy decisions and/or other lawful mechanisms).
privacy_v2.s8_intro: We keep data for as long as needed for the purpose of processing and/or as required by law. Typical periods (example — adjust to real rules):
privacy_v2.s8_li1: account data: while the account is active; after account closure, retained for up to 90 days (unless the law requires longer) for backups and abuse prevention, then deleted or anonymised.
privacy_v2.s8_li2: service data: until deleted by the user or for up to 90 days after account closure, in line with retention rules.
privacy_v2.s8_li3: security logs: typically up to 12 months
privacy_v2.s8_li4: marketing data based on consent: until consent is withdrawn or the defined period expires
privacy_v2.s9_intro: We apply technical and organisational measures, including (where applicable):
privacy_v2.s10_li6: objection to processing based on legitimate interests
privacy_v2.s10_li7: withdrawal of consent (where consent is the basis)
privacy_v2.s10_complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy_v2.s11_body: The service is not intended for persons under 16 without parental/guardian consent where required by law.
privacy_v2.s12_body: We may update this policy from time to time. The updated version will be published on this page with a new “last updated” date. If changes are material, we will notify users in an appropriate way within the service.
privacy_v2.s13_intro: For questions about privacy and data processing:
privacy_v2.s13_li_address: Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom

cookie_policy.meta_description: How Servisna Knjižica uses cookies and similar technologies; categories, third parties and consent. Controller: Green Line Trading LTD.
cookie_policy.intro_note: This policy explains which cookies and similar technologies we use in connection with Servisna Knjižica and how you can manage your choices. For details on personal data processing, see the Privacy Policy.
cookie_policy.owner_intro: The controller responsible for cookies in the context of this site and application is:
cookie_policy.owner_li_address: Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
cookie_policy.what_body: Cookies are small text files that a site or application may store on your device. They are used for core functionality, remembering settings, statistics and (with consent) advertising.
cookie_policy.types_intro: Depending on their function, we use the following categories:
cookie_policy.type_essential_body: Required for basic operation, security and session (e.g. sign-in, CSRF, load balancing).
cookie_policy.type_functional_body: Improve user experience (e.g. language or interface preferences), where applicable.
cookie_policy.type_analytics_body: Help us understand how the service is used (e.g. Google Analytics). Activated after consent where required.
cookie_policy.type_marketing_body: Used to measure and display ads (e.g. Meta/Facebook Pixel). Activated after consent where required.
cookie_policy.third_party_body: We may use third-party tools that set their own cookies, in line with their policies:
cookie_policy.tp_fb: Meta/Facebook Pixel (advertising and measurement, where enabled)
cookie_policy.retention_body: Duration depends on the cookie type (session or persistent). You can see details in your browser settings or third-party tools.
cookie_policy.manage_body: You can change your choice at any time via the cookie banner on the site and/or your browser settings. More on data processing: Privacy Policy.
cookie_policy.changes_body: We may update the Cookie Policy; the updated version will be published on this page with a new date.
cookie_policy.contact_intro: For questions about cookies and privacy:
cookie_policy.contact_li_address: Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom

tos.meta_description: Terms of Service for RideLogger / Servisna Knjižica. Operator: Green Line Trading LTD (UK). Free vs Premium, AI Assistant, data ownership, EU/UK consumer rights.
tos.content_html:
RideLogger (known as Servisna Knjižica in Balkan markets) is a digital vehicle logbook for fuel fills, service records, expenses, EV charging and maintenance reminders. These Terms form a binding agreement between you and Green Line Trading LTD, the company that operates the service.

1. About us

  • Legal entity: Green Line Trading LTD
  • UK company number: 13072235 (Companies House)
  • Registered address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
  • Contact: nemanjam@greenlinetrading.co.uk

2. Accepting these Terms

By creating an account or using the service, you confirm that you are at least 16 years old, that you have read these Terms, and that you agree to them. If you don't agree, please don't use the service.

3. The service

RideLogger lets you log fuel, services, expenses, EV charges and reminders for vehicles you own or manage. Data is private to your account by default. The service is offered as a web app and as mobile apps (iOS and Android).

4. Your account

  • You're responsible for keeping your login details private and for everything that happens under your account.
  • Provide accurate information when you register.
  • One account per person (or per legal entity for business / dealer accounts).
  • Don't share an account across unrelated third parties.

5. Free and Premium

The core logbook is free to use. Some features (for example multiple attachments per record, custom reminders, extended history, dealer / multi-vehicle tools) are part of Premium, our paid subscription.

  • Premium is billed in advance on a recurring basis until you cancel.
  • You can cancel Premium at any time from your account settings; access continues until the end of the current billing period.
  • Unless applicable consumer law requires otherwise, subscription fees are non-refundable for partial periods.
  • Prices and features may change; material changes apply to future billing cycles, not the one you already paid for.

If you are a consumer located in the EU or UK, you retain any mandatory statutory cancellation and refund rights granted by your local consumer law; these Terms do not limit those rights.

6. Your data, our role

You own the content you put into RideLogger (vehicle details, service records, notes, photos, attachments). We only store and process that content to provide the service to you.

We may compute anonymised and aggregated statistics from overall usage (for example: typical fuel consumption for a make/model) to improve the product and share general insights. Anonymised data cannot be linked back to you.

For how we handle personal data, see our Privacy Policy. Your rights under GDPR (and UK-GDPR where applicable) are described there.

7. AI Assistant

RideLogger includes an optional AI Assistant. When you use it, your messages and the relevant vehicle context are sent to a third-party large language model provider (currently OpenAI) so a response can be generated.

  • By using the AI Assistant, you consent to this processing.
  • We configure the integration so that your content is not used by the provider to train their public models, to the extent their API terms allow.
  • The assistant may occasionally produce inaccurate or incomplete answers. Do not rely on it for safety-critical decisions (e.g. whether a vehicle is safe to drive). Use your judgement or consult a qualified mechanic.
  • You can choose not to use the AI Assistant and still use the rest of the service normally.

8. Third-party providers

To run the service we use trusted providers for hosting, payments, email delivery and the AI feature. These providers process data only to the extent needed to deliver their part of the service. We do not sell your personal data.

9. Acceptable use

Please don't use RideLogger to:

  • upload content that is illegal, infringing, hateful or harmful;
  • attempt to break, overload, reverse-engineer or scrape the service;
  • impersonate someone else or misrepresent vehicle information;
  • use automated tools in a way that disrupts the service for others.

10. Deleting your account

You can delete your account at any time from the app. When you delete, your personal data and logbook content are removed from the active service within a reasonable period, subject to short retention in backups for security and legal reasons, as described in the Privacy Policy.

11. Suspension and termination by us

We may suspend or terminate accounts that materially violate these Terms, abuse the service, or put other users at risk. Where reasonable, we will warn you first and give you a chance to fix the issue. If you paid for Premium and we terminate your account for reasons other than your breach, we will refund any prepaid, unused portion.

12. Service "as is"

We build and run RideLogger with care, but the service is provided "as is". We don't guarantee uninterrupted availability, especially on the free tier. Scheduled maintenance, incidents and outages can happen. Nothing in these Terms excludes any liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law, and your statutory consumer rights remain unaffected.

13. Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Green Line Trading LTD is not liable for indirect or consequential losses (such as lost profits, lost data beyond the retention we offer, or vehicle downtime). Our total liability for any claim relating to the service is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months before the event giving rise to the claim, or EUR 50 — whichever is higher.

14. Changes to these Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. The "last updated" date at the top will change. For material changes, we will notify you in the app or by email in advance. If you continue to use the service after the change takes effect, you accept the updated Terms.

15. Governing law and disputes

These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales, where Green Line Trading LTD is registered. If you are a consumer in the EU or the UK, you keep the protection of the mandatory provisions of the law of your country of residence, and you may also bring proceedings there. For non-consumer users, the courts of England and Wales have exclusive jurisdiction.

16. Contact

Questions about these Terms? Reach us at nemanjam@greenlinetrading.co.uk.
